full_title: DoD Cyber Workforce Framework (DCWF) Work Role Tool
publisher: U.S. Department of Defense, Chief Information Officer
license: GREEN — U.S. Government public release, unlimited distribution
format: XLSX (Work Role Tool with per-role tabs and Master KSAT List)
notes: DCWF is derived from NIST SP 800-181 (NICE Framework) with DoD-specific extensions including Data/AI and Software Engineering workforce elements. Version 5.1 adds 75 work roles across 7 workforce elements with 2,945 KSAT elements (1,277 tasks, 1,668 KSAs).
